'''jathatha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:thalassoceratid|thalassoceratid]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-th-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:thalassoceratid|thalassoceratid]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| jathatha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:jæthæthæth|jæthæthæth]] || [[word:jæthæthæj|jæthæthæj]] || [[word:jæthæthæsh|jæthæthæsh]] || [[word:jæthæthæ|jæthæthæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:jathathathath|jathathathath]] || [[word:jathathathaj|jathathathaj]] || [[word:jathathathash|jathathathash]] || [[word:jathathatha|jathathatha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:jathathath|jathathath]] || [[word:jathathaj|jathathaj]] || [[word:jathathash|jathathash]] || [[word:jathatha|jathatha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:jathafthath|jathafthath]] || [[word:jathafthaj|jathafthaj]] || [[word:jathafthash|jathafthash]] || [[word:jathafthaf|jathafthaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:jathathatha|jathathatha]] || [[word:jathathaja|jathathaja]] || [[word:jathathasha|jathathasha]] || [[word:jathathaka|jathathaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:jathathath|jathathath]] || [[word:jathathaj|jathathaj]] || [[word:jathathash|jathathash]] || [[word:jathatha|jathatha]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:jathathathal|jathathathal]] || [[word:jathathajal|jathathajal]] || [[word:jathathashal|jathathashal]] || [[word:jathathakal|jathathakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:jathathathatha|jathathathatha]] || [[word:jathathajaja|jathathajaja]] || [[word:jathathashasha|jathathashasha]] || [[word:jathathaka|jathathaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:jathathathan|jathathathan]] || [[word:jathathajan|jathathajan]] || [[word:jathathashan|jathathashan]] || [[word:jathathakan|jathathakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:jathathathaoro|jathathathaoro]] || [[word:jathathajaoro|jathathajaoro]] || [[word:jathathashaoro|jathathashaoro]] || [[word:jathathakaoro|jathathakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5445898}}
